name: helm-protocol
description: Cryptographic audit trail for Claude Code. Every workflow step and agent action — timestamped, tamper-proof, and verifiable.

plugins.name: openttt-pot
plugins.description: Add cryptographic timestamps to Claude Code Dynamic Workflows and multi-agent tasks. IETF TTTPS-compliant. MiFIR Art.22c audit-grade. Instantly prove when each agent acted, what it produced, and in what order.
